flashcards.front: What is the purpose of static methods in interfaces?
flashcards.back: To define utility methods that can be used without creating an instance of the interface.

flashcards.front: How can you call a static method in an interface?
Can static methods in interfaces be overridden by classes that implement the interface?
What is the purpose of defining default behavior for classes that implement an interface?
flashcards.back: To provide a default implementation for abstract methods.

flashcards.front: Can static methods in interfaces be used to define instance methods?
